english translation text: Woh noor jisko shahe mashreqain kehte haiThe light that we call the king of the east and the west
Usi ko noor e khuda noor e ain kehte haiWe call it the light of God and the light of our eyes
Bikhar gaya to wohi noor kaayinat banaWhen it spread this light became the universe
Simat gaya to usi ko Hussain kehte haiWhen that light comes together it is known as Hussain
Hum Husain (A.S.) Waale HainWe are of Hussain (A.S)
Ye humaari qismat hai, hum Husain (A.S.) waale HainThis is our good fortune, We are the people of Hussain (A.S)
Hum Nabi (S.A.W.) ke aashiq hai, hum Ali (A.S.) ke deewaneWe are the lovers of Nabi (S.A.W), we are the lovers of Ali (A.S.)
Aur Hassan (A.S.) se nisbat haiAnd we are connected with Hassan (A.S.)
Hum se Fatema Zehra (A.S.), kar chuki hai ek waadaBibi Fatema (A.S.) has already made a promise to us…

urdu transliteration text:
Ab humaari jannat haiParadise is now for us
Hum Husain (A.S.) Waale Hain

english translation text: Ya Ali (A.S.) ki midhat hai, Ya Husain (A.S.) ka maatamWe praise Imam Ali (A.S.), we do maatam for Hussain (A.S.)
Har nafas Ibaadat haiEvery breath of this is worship
Hum bataate dunya ko, hum se puchti dunyaWe would tell the entire world, if only they asked us

urdu transliteration text:
Gham mein kitni lazzat haiHow much pleasure is derived from lamenting (on Imam Hussain)
Hum Husain (A.S.) Waale Hain

Khulq hai Murawwat hai Ilm o Fan hai Hikmat HaiWe are well mannered, courteous, knowledgeable, talented and wise
Hum Husain (A.S.) Waale Hain

english translation text: Khun mein sharaafat haiThere is decency in our blood
